title: malaxis micrantha
intro: Malaxis micrantha, also known as the small-flowered malaxis or small yellow bog orchid, is a species of orchid native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malaxis micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Malaxis micrantha often involve infusions or decoctions made from the plant's leaves and roots, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and salves for medicinal purposes.
